name: Trajectory Step
description: Wrap a JointTrajectory into a named PlanStep, ready to feed into Cf_MotionPlan. The name + description live next to the trajectory that produced them, so they cannot drift out of sync.

inputParameters.name: name
inputParameters.description: Unique name for this step within the plan (e.g. 'approach', 'descend', 'retract').

inputParameters.name: trajectory
inputParameters.description: JointTrajectory output of a planner (Plan Motion / Plan Cartesian Motion).
